calls.content:
### Work Breakdown Structure
* Frontend Development
  + Implement review form with star rating, text, and photo upload (8 person days)
  + Display average product rating on product pages (4 person days)
  + Implement photo preview and upload functionality (6 person days)
* Backend Development
  + Create API endpoint for submitting reviews (4 person days)
  + Develop review moderation system (8 person days)
  + Implement average rating calculation and storage (3 person days)
* Testing and Deployment
  + Test review submission and moderation functionality (8 person days)
  + Test average rating display and photo upload (6 person days)
  + Deploy changes to production environment (4 person days)

### Total Estimate
51 person days

### Assumptions
* The company's existing tech stack and infrastructure can support the new features without significant changes.
* The review moderation system will be simple and not require complex workflows or integrations.
* The average rating calculation will be a simple arithmetic mean and not require complex weighting or algorithms.
* The testing and deployment process will follow the company's existing procedures and will not require significant additional setup or configuration.
* The photo upload functionality will be limited to three photos per review and will not require advanced image processing or storage solutions.
